title: cybele laurina
intro: Cybele laurina, also known as African olive or African boxwood, is a plant species in the Lauraceae family. The medicinal properties of Cybele laurina include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cybele laurina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support skin health. Cybele laurina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
